ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。每局游戏限一次，如果他提名过邪恶玩家：你可以选择杀死除他以外的提名过邪恶玩家的玩家。
otherNightReminder: Wake the Myling. They will choose a player. That player dies - mark them with the Myling's DEAD reminder token. If they have nominated evil this game, notify the Myling: They will nod their head "yes" or shake their head "no" for whether or not other evil nominators die. Then, put the Myling to sleep.
